content.cn_text: [旁白]: 你将听到两名学生讨论参加一项课程，以成为一名个人
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You will hear a discussion between two students about taking a course to become a personal

content.cn_text: 护理人员。
content.en_text: support worker.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看问题21至24。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 21 to 24.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听并回答问题21至24。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 21 to 24.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 贝琪，你好，你在这里的大学做什么？
content.en_text: [Jason]: Becky, hi, what are you doing here at the college?

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 嗨，杰森，我只是来用图书馆，你呢？
content.en_text: [Becky]: Hi Jason, just using the library, what about you?

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 我正在上PSW课程，你知道的，就是个人护理员。
content.en_text: [Jason]: I'm taking the PSW program, you know, personal support worker.

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 你在开玩笑吧，我刚获得PSW资格。
content.en_text: [Becky]: You're kidding, I've just qualified as a PSW.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 真的吗？
content.en_text: [Jason]: Really?

content.cn_text: 我很想和你聊聊这个课程。
content.en_text: I'd love to talk to you about the program.

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 好的，首先，他们在这里教我的主要职责正是我工作所需的。
content.en_text: [Becky]: Okay, well, first off, the main duties they taught me here were exactly what I needed

content.cn_text: 职责。
content.en_text: on the job.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 你是指像帮人洗澡和穿衣吗？
content.en_text: [Jason]: You mean like bathing and dressing people?

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 是的，无论老少都需要这个，你会和所有年龄段的人一起工作，从年轻的
content.en_text: [Becky]: Yes, young and old need this, you'll work with people of all ages from young people

content.cn_text: 残疾人到老年人。
content.en_text: with disabilities to seniors.

content.cn_text: 但你知道，没有什么能真正让你准备好面对许多人有多么孤独。
content.en_text: But you know, nothing really prepares you for how alone many people are.

content.cn_text: 他们渴望交谈，我不介意在工作时和他们聊天，尽管那不是
content.en_text: They crave conversation, and I don't mind chatting with them while I work, though that's

content.cn_text: 我工作职责中正式包含的内容。
content.en_text: not officially in my job description.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 我想我更想专注于老年护理。
content.en_text: [Jason]: I think I'd like to focus on seniors care.

content.cn_text: 而且随着国家老年人口的增长，也许我能很快找到工作。
content.en_text: And with the country's older population growing, maybe I'll get a job fast.

content.cn_text: 我们需要负责任何药物吗？
content.en_text: Do we have to be responsible for any medications?

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 不，那不是我们做的。
content.en_text: [Becky]: No, that's not for us to do.

content.cn_text: 虽然你会准备饭菜，但你不会喂人吃饭。
content.en_text: And while you will prepare meals, you won't feed people.

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 但努力让客户保持健康，并尽可能长时间地独立生活，没有风险
content.en_text: [Becky]: But working to keep clients healthy and able to live on their own without risk as long

content.cn_text: 始终是目标。
content.en_text: as possible is always the goal.

content.cn_text: 我们认识到，随着寿命的延长，长期护理设施将无法
content.en_text: And we're recognizing that with life spans increasing, long term care facilities won't

content.cn_text: 满足需要护理的人数。
content.en_text: be able to keep up with the number of people who will need care.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 我差点不符合进入PSW课程的要求。
content.en_text: [Jason]: I almost didn't meet the requirements for entry into the PSW program.

content.cn_text: 我差一个核心课程才能拿到高中毕业证书，所以我不得不回去上暑期学校。
content.en_text: I was one core short getting my high school diploma, so I had to go back to summer school.

content.cn_text: 我学了科学，因为我不擅长数学。哦，说到入学，我有急救证书真是万幸。没有它，我也会被拒之门外。[贝琪]: 我本来会有免疫接种的问题，但前一年我旅行了。医生检查我的记录时，它们都是最新的。我还必须提交一篇关于为什么我想成为PSW的书面文章。
content.en_text: I took science because I'm no good at math. Oh, and speaking of not getting in, having my first aid certificate was a real piece of luck. I would have been turned down without that, too. [Becky]: And I would have had a problem with immunizations except that I traveled the year before. And when the doctor checked my records, they were up to date. I also had to hand in a written essay on why I wanted to be a PSW.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 在你听到对话的其余部分之前，你有一些时间查看问题25
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the discussion, you have some time to look at questions 25
to 30.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题25至30。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 25 to 30.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 那么贝琪，你觉得个人护理员课程中你必须上的那些课程怎么样？
content.en_text: [Jason]: So Becky, what did you think about the courses you had to take in the personal support worker

content.cn_text: 课程怎么样？
content.en_text: program?

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 嗯，我以前认为我与人沟通得很好，直到我上了
content.en_text: [Becky]: Well, I used to think I got my points across pretty well with people until I took the

content.cn_text: 理解是基础课程。
content.en_text: understanding is essential course.

content.cn_text: 首先，它教会了我如何更有效地表达自己。
content.en_text: For starters, it taught me how to express myself much more effectively.

content.cn_text: 我还学到了很多关于为我的主管准备清晰报告以及如何更好地与人打交道的知识。
content.en_text: I also learned a lot about preparing clear reports for my supervisors and dealing in a

content.cn_text: 例如，在陈述事实时避免个人观点。
content.en_text: better way with people in general, you know, like giving facts without personal views.

content.cn_text: 你会发现你每天都需要这些技能。
content.en_text: You'll find that you need those skills every single day.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 我很喜欢基础课程。
content.en_text: [Jason]: I'm enjoying the foundations course.

content.cn_text: 我现在正在上这门课，从中获益匪浅，因为护理员是该省较新的一种
content.en_text: I'm taking it now and I'm getting a lot out of it because support workers are a newer

content.cn_text: 护理级别。
content.en_text: level of care in the province.

content.cn_text: 我认为我们绝对必须了解我们如何融入整个体系。
content.en_text: I think we absolutely have to understand how we fit into the overall system.

content.cn_text: 这是一个自由表达意见的好地方。
content.en_text: It's a great place to voice your opinions freely.

content.cn_text: 有些是相当私人的。
content.en_text: Some are quite personal.

content.cn_text: 你有没有上过一门叫做《我们的工作方式》的课程？
content.en_text: Did you have to take a course called the way we work?

content.cn_text: 我不知道心理学是课程的一部分。
content.en_text: I didn't know psychology was part of the program.

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 那门课是我最喜欢的，但可能不是你所想的那样，杰森。
content.en_text: [Becky]: That course was a favorite of mine, but it's probably not what you're thinking, Jason.

content.cn_text: 它是关于身体内部发生的事情，并涵盖了维持我们身体
content.en_text: It's about what happens on the inside of the body and covers the functions that keep

content.cn_text: 良好运作的功能。
content.en_text: our bodies operating well.

content.cn_text: 即使你不是PSW，这门课也真的很有趣。
content.en_text: Even if you're not a PSW, the course is really interesting.

content.cn_text: 我学到了很多。
content.en_text: I learned so much.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 你觉得居住护理怎么样？
content.en_text: [Jason]: What do you think about residence care?

content.cn_text: 我知道现在的观点是长期护理设施不是我们
content.en_text: I know the thinking now is that long-term care facilities aren't the answer for our

content.cn_text: 老龄人口的解决方案。
content.en_text: aging population.

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 对。
content.en_text: [Becky]: Right.

content.cn_text: 这门课专注于人们可以对自己的家进行改造，以便他们可以住在那里，
content.en_text: This course zeroes in on the changes people can make to their homes so they can stay there,

content.cn_text: 例如安装更高的马桶。
content.en_text: like installing higher toilets, for example.

content.cn_text: 你还会学到专用设备。
content.en_text: You'll also learn about specialized equipment.

content.cn_text: 人们可以用来帮助自己，比如淋浴扶手等等。
content.en_text: People can get to help themselves, safety bars for the shower and so on.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 有没有课程关注我们客户的家庭？
content.en_text: [Jason]: Do any of the courses focus on the families of our clients?

content.cn_text: 毕竟，任何疾病或残疾都会影响到每一个人。
content.en_text: After all, any kind of illness or disability affects everybody.

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 说得太对了。
content.en_text: [Becky]: So true.

content.cn_text: 是的，有一门。
content.en_text: And yes, there is one.

content.cn_text: 它叫《动态》。
content.en_text: It's called dynamics.

content.cn_text: 你通常会在最后一个学期学到它。
content.en_text: You usually get that in your last term.

content.cn_text: 你将学习不同的策略来帮助缓解家庭内部的一些焦虑和压力
content.en_text: You'll learn different strategies to help relieve some of the anxiety and strain that

content.cn_text: 发生的情况。
content.en_text: happens within the family.

content.cn_text: 我从那门课中学到了很多。
content.en_text: I got a lot out of that course.

content.cn_text: 它是唯一一门专注于情感而非事实的课程。
content.en_text: It's the only one that focuses on emotions rather than facts.

content.cn_text: 我认为给予人们这种帮助与任何昂贵的
content.en_text: I think giving people this kind of help is just as valuable as any kind of expensive

content.cn_text: 他们购买来帮助自己的设备一样有价值。
content.en_text: equipment they buy to help themselves.

content.cn_text: [杰森]: 我真正期待的课程是《内在力量》。
content.en_text: [Jason]: The course I'm really looking forward to is the power within.

content.cn_text: [贝琪]: 哦，太棒了。
content.en_text: [Becky]: Oh, it's terrific.

content.cn_text: 正如你所知，衰老对心智有相当大的影响。
content.en_text: Getting old has quite an impact on the mind, as you know.

content.cn_text: 但你会学到一些方法来帮助客户保持思维活跃，这样他们就不会那么健忘。
content.en_text: But you'll be taught ways to help clients keep the mind active so they're not so forgetful.

content.cn_text: 当你运用这些方法时，你会惊讶于客户的改善程度
content.en_text: You'd be surprised how much improvement you can see in clients when you apply these

content.cn_text: 方法。
content.en_text: methods.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 第三部分到此结束。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of part three.

content.cn_text: 现在你有30秒时间检查第三部分的答案。
content.en_text: We now have 30 seconds to check your answers to part three.

groups.desc:

list.title: B
list.content: helping clients to eat and drink

list.title: D
list.content: ensuring clients are well and safe

groups.desc: Choose SIX answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–G, next to questions 25–30.
